description_long: This is a tall, rectangular apartment building with a modern, utilitarian design. The facade features a repeating grid of windows, each framed with red accents, giving the building a distinctive geometric appearance. The structure has two main vertical sections, each topped with a flat roof and mechanical units. One side of the building displays a series of balconies, while the other sides are more uniform with only windows. The base of the building is slightly extended, suggesting a possible lobby or entrance area. The overall color palette is dominated by white and gray, with red highlights around the windows and at the base.
description: A tall, modern apartment building with a grid of red-framed windows, flat roofs, and one side featuring balconies.
description_view_0: This view shows the main facade with a prominent grid of red-framed windows and a central vertical section with balconies.
description_view_1: This side displays a flat wall with a vertical line of windows and a small entrance at the base.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a uniform grid of windows with no balconies or entrances visible.
description_view_3: This angle highlights the building's flat roof structures and the side with multiple balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly regular, vertical and horizontal grid pattern, with each window framed in red. The arrangement is symmetrical and evenly spaced across all visible facades.
